prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document specifically pertains to the Ministry of Justice and the systems in place in England and Wales. While the statistics may offer insights relevant to the entire UK, it does not apply directly to Scotland, as criminal justice is devolved and managed separately in Scotland.
